positive: A stylized geometric sloth surrounded by lush tropical foliage, depicted as a clean, bold silhouette print on a neutral background. The sloth is climbing a stylized Monstera leaf, giving a feeling of serene movement and jungle whimsy. Use negative space effectively to create high contrast. The overall aesthetic should be contemporary, minimalist junglecore with a touch of Art Deco geometry. Color direction: Deep emerald greens, terracotta oranges, and slate blues, accented by creamy off-white. Studio lighting, perfectly centered composition, vector illustration quality, high contrast, 8k, ultra-detailed.
